definition: Case identifier (prefixed c12_ for BPIC12, c17_ for BPIC17)
Activity name from the BPM system
Sub-process origin (Application / Offer / Workflow)
Event lifecycle transition
Event timestamp in UTC
pre_2012 (BPIC12) or post_2017 (BPIC17)
Stage identifier (1..4) under unified stage model
Name of the stage in scope
Sequential month index (1..6 = pre, 7..19 = post)
Mean case-level time within stage-month (hours)
Share of cases with an exception activity in that stage-month
Share of cases whose stage time exceeded the 75th percentile
Share of cases with no exception and no rework
Count of cases touching the stage in the month
Count of cases with within-stage rework
1 if era is post_2017 (real system change), else 0
Performance Growth Indicator composite score
1 if pgi_score >= median, else 0
End-to-end case duration across stages (hours)
Distinct stages visited by the case
Total events recorded for the case
1 if any stage shows activity repetition
1 if any stage exceeded its SLA threshold
Loan amount requested by the applicant
1 if case had any exception or SLA breach (RQ2 target)
